facts: status, mode_get, and accounts_list are primary truth and their failures produce integration_failure
healthcheck failures produce degraded warning detail
rollout_rotation_inspect failures produce warning/event without full integration failure
browser UI fetches only api/live-readonly and does not submit command_id
no direct state/log/registry reads were introduced
runtime.py, web_ui.py, and ui_shell.py are not changed by this contour
residual_risks: wild_boar_proxy/runtime.py remains dirty outside this contour
the auditor did not run full repo-wide regression; full regression is recorded separately
